case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. NANCY SUSY ZAMORA MARTINEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-02-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-02-2019 BY ANDREW Y. S. CHENG. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ZAMORA MARTINEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: ANDREW Y.S. CHENG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 - SERVED JAN-14-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, NANCY SUSY ZAMORA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-02-2019 - JUDGMENT.

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-08-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-02-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT NANCY SUSY ZAMORA MARITNEZ DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, NANCY SUSY ZAMORA $651.47 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $736.47 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
